name: pi-digital-rust-theme
description: A warm, tech-dystopian color scheme for Pi, inspired by corrupted hardware and failing systems.
readme:
# Digital Rust theme for Pi

> A warm, tech-dystopian color scheme for Pi inspired by corrupted hardware and failing systems.

![Theme Screenshot](https://digitalrust.katsuricata.com/piscreenshot.webp)

## Installation

Install from npm:

```bash
pi install npm:pi-digital-rust-theme
```

Or git:

```bash
pi install git:codeberg.org/TheMeerkat/DigitalRust/src/branch/main/ports/digitalrustpi
```

## Theme Preview

The `digital-rust` theme features a b̵e̷a̴u̸t̸i̵f̴u̸l̸ red-centered color palette inspired by corrupted hardware, failing systems, and the warm decay of technology. Embrace the downfall of society… *stylishly.*

|------|-------|

| Null Pointer | `#230905` |
| Core Meltdown | `#340d07` |
| Bad Sector | `#46120a` |
| Daemon Blood | `#57170d` |
| Dark Packet | `#691b0f` |
| Bricked Board | `#7a2012` |
| Data Rot | `#8c2414` |
| Kernel Panic | `#9d2917` |
| **Digital Rust** | `#af2e1a` |
| Firewall Breach | `#b74230` |
| Amber Alert | `#bf5747` |
| Rouge Signal | `#c76c5e` |

| Phantom Current | `#e7c0ba` |

### Accent Colors

| Name | Color |
|------|-------|

| Blue Screen | `#8791b0` |
| Fractured Shell | `#ba5a7d` |

| Thermal Throttle | `#d78556` |

## Usage

After installation, use the theme by passing it to pi:

```bash
pi --theme digital-rust
```

To make it the default, use the `/settings` command and select the theme.

Or add it directly to `~/.pi/agent/settings.json`:

```json
{
  "theme": "digital-rust"
}
```

Or use `pi config` to enable it interactively:

```bash
pi config
```

Then use `space` to toggle the digital-rust theme.

## Homepage

Visit [the Digital Rust homepage](https://digitalrust.katsuricata.com/ "Digital Rust") to learn more about the theme and explore other available ports, including VSCode, Firefox, KDE Plasma, Kate, fish, Konsole, wallpapers, and more.
